title: roldana jurgensenii
intro: Roldana jurgensenii, also known as Mexican mint, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Roldana jurgensenii include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. Roldana jurgensenii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal use, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
